commits.message: feat(home): deep hero cleanup — remove cyber grid, 2 orbs, scanline, simplified marquee, hide AgentSimulator section
feat(hero-canvas): 3D upgrade — vanishing-point floor grid, blob drop shadows, cannon ground-glow puddle
feat(mobile): upgrade WebView — offline cache-first, retry on error, haptic feedback, security flags, score postMessage bridge
feat(blockchain): add SQUISH_TOKEN_MINT CA constant, SQUISH_DECIMALS, getSquishPriceJupiter() to token SDK
security: tighten CSP & CORP, add referrerPolicy to external links, WebView setSupportMultipleWindows=false
chore(mobile/app.json): bump version 1.0.0→1.1.0, versionCode 1→2, android+iOS build numbers updated
feat(home): live $SQUISH price ticker with Jupiter API fallback to DexScreener, auto-refresh 30s
feat(home): redesign CA card footer — 2-column share grid, SHARE ON X & SHARE ON TG buttons
feat(home): subtitle tightened, mute button reduced opacity, subtitle mobile wrap fixed
security: extend CSP connect-src to allow Jupiter price API and DexScreener for live pricing
feat(blockchain): set live $SQUISH contract address — CA now active on Solana Mainnet
feat: smooth characters, Crystal & Ninja blobs, hit squash, cannon lerp, new achievements
feat(game): TANK+SPLITTER blobs, MAGNET powerup, boss phase 3, secure localStorage, CSP improvements
feat(ui): add Security category to changelog — keyword detection, yellow tab, EN/JA i18n
security: add Cross-Origin-Opener/Resource/Embedder-Policy headers + legal routes
feat(nav): add Changelog link
feat(changelog): restore /changelog route
feat(blockchain): on-chain leaderboard program
feat(sdk): add staking SDK with tier multipliers
feat: smoother gameplay, 3D blob effects, upgraded level-up cards
feat: roguelite upgrade system — fire rate, double/triple shot, big bullet, fast bullet, pierce, explosive on level-up
feat: upgrade blob rendering — glossy 3D gradients, surface bumps, bigger googly eyes, Pixar sheen
feat(footer): add Terms of Service link
feat(legal): add Terms of Service page
feat(feedback): add /feedback route with auto device info, tweet & DM to @oroimho
feat: add Capacitor APK build workflow via GitHub Actions
fix: replace Indonesian text with English + i18n support
